subject: Humanoid figure with very long flowing hair and a large white feathered wing, dressed in layered pink and white robes
description: A humanoid figure stands in a composed, elegant pose wearing layered robes in shades of pink, magenta, and white with ruffled trim. Extremely long flowing hair — predominantly yellow-gold near the face transitioning to vivid pink — trails downward and behind the figure. A large white feathered wing extends from one side of the figure. The illustration style is Yoshitaka Amano's distinctive painterly line-art — delicate, loose ink strokes with light watercolor washes. The background is minimal and pale, keeping focus on the figure. The overall impression is ethereal and serene.
foreground: Robed figure with long flowing hair and white feathered wing
